name: 5pc Copper Metal Herb Plant Stakes - Threshold™
description:
Bring a whimsical addition to your yard with these 5-Piece Copper Metal Herb Plant Stakes from Threshold™. Crafted from metal, these five plant stakes enhance garden soil while promoting strong roots and healthy growth. Showcasing a simple design with leaf-shaped top, these gold-tone stakes make a beautiful addition to your decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
